remarks: Spacious & Stylish Corner Unit 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo with no neighbors on either side in an elevator building. Conveniently located near I-95, the Merritt Parkway, and all major shopping destinations.Gourmet Kitchen - Granite countertops, breakfast bar, and stainless steel appliances. Hardwood floors throughout, updated bathrooms with stylish tile. Comfortable Living - Gas fireplace, central air, and in-unit washer/dryer. Spacious Bedrooms - Primary suite with walk-in closet and en-suite bath. Secure Parking & Storage - Gated garage with two assigned spaces and storage locker. Pets considered! Must have excellent credit and income verification.Don't miss this!
